task_completion.description: Load the cell bodies and cell nuclei images
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing Fiji/ImageJ with cell_bodies.tif and cell_nuclei.tif open, or a script/terminal explicitly loading these files from ~/Fiji_Data/raw/voronoi_task/.

task_completion.description: Perform Voronoi tessellation seeded by nuclear centroids
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the application of a Voronoi algorithm (e.g., Fiji Voronoi plugin, or Python code using scipy.spatial.Voronoi/skimage) generating polygonal territories around nuclei.

task_completion.description: Exclude edge-touching cells from the analysis
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a GUI option checked for 'Exclude on edges' or code explicitly filtering out cells/polygons that touch the image boundaries.

task_completion.description: Save territory measurements to a CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the creation or content of territory_measurements.csv in ~/Fiji_Data/results/voronoi/, containing columns for cell_id, centroid_x, centroid_y, area_px, perimeter_px, circularity, solidity, and neighbors.

task_completion.description: Save an image overlaying Voronoi boundaries on cell bodies
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the creation or viewing of voronoi_overlay.png in ~/Fiji_Data/results/voronoi/, displaying polygonal Voronoi boundaries drawn over the original cell bodies image.

task_completion.description: Save a text file summarizing the spatial analysis
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the creation or content of spatial_summary.txt in ~/Fiji_Data/results/voronoi/, containing values for total_cells_detected, mean_area_px, mean_circularity, and mean_neighbors.

integrity.description: Agent performed actual image processing rather than faking outputs
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of Fiji/ImageJ execution, macro running, or a Python script being executed. The agent should not just be typing numbers into a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not hardcode the final summary or CSV values
integrity.visual_evidence: Check scripts or command history to ensure the agent is dynamically calculating the area, neighbors, and circularity rather than printing fixed, pre-determined strings.

integrity.description: Agent used the correct simulated cell monolayer images
integrity.visual_evidence: The images visible in the GUI or the final voronoi_overlay.png should look like a synthetic cell monolayer (BBBC005 dataset) with dimensions 696x520, not random noise or an unrelated image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset is BBBC005 (Simulated Cell Monolayer) with image dimensions 696x520. The final CSV must contain at least 8 valid cells (rows). The mean area should be between 500 and 50000 pixels. The mean neighbors should be between 4.0 and 8.0. The required columns in the CSV are 'cell_id', 'area', and 'neighbor' (case-insensitive). Note: The setup script contains a bug, so the agent may have had to manually fix the script or extract/rename the files to obtain the images.
